sources.type: long-form Authority Magazine interview (career advice format with differentiation context)

research_notes.selected_from: Doc 1 (English TL;DR) — research-recommended candidate; ~2,200 words claimed verified by web_fetch on Authority Magazine
research_notes.verification: Authority Magazine page fetched 2026-05-09. WebFetch summarized; verbatim recovery via two prompts yielded ~7-8 quotes. Combined here as primary source.
research_notes.linkedin: Headline only ('CEO & Co-Founder at Aquant'); About section pending manual collection. Using marker pattern from Buildots.
research_notes.track_decision: depth (Track B). Same constraint as Buildots — only 1 independent source with substantive verbatim content recoverable via WebFetch. Emerj podcast and Service Council pages are episode landings without transcripts.
research_notes.different_from_buildots: Different industry (field-service AI vs construction AI), different positioning archetype (Domain-Empathy + service intelligence vs Mechanism + digital twin). Comparing two single-source candidates from different verticals tests whether the playbook discriminates.
